institution.name: Mt San Jacinto Community College District

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Mt San Jacinto Community College District rose 38% between 2007 and 2010 ($4.0k → $5.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Mt San Jacinto Community College District rose 30% between 2007 and 2010 ($600 → $780).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Mt San Jacinto Community College District rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 ($11.3k → $12.7k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Mt San Jacinto Community College District fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.1% → 0.0%).
